tsne.key_finding: t-SNE reveals clear separation between hematologic and solid tumor trials (cluster distance=65.8 units vs spread=25.0/25.7). This mirrors the bird classifier's species clustering by visual similarity.

similarity.key_finding: Cosine similarity on trial embeddings (adapted from bird species similarity search): Cancers with many successful templates (Neuroendocrine, Leukemia (ALL)) have high similarity scores (1.000, 0.999), while treatment deserts (Head & Neck) score only 0.992 — meaning researchers designing trials for these cancers have very few proven templates to follow.

feature_importance.description: Feature vector used to embed each trial (analogous to pixel channels in bird classifier)
